summary: Matched and linked src/melee/mn/mninfobonus.c by making small source-structure and constant-expression adjustments, then moving the object from NonMatching to Matching in configure.py. The symbols file was updated to reflect the newly linked layout: mnInfoBonus_803EFCE8 shrank from 0x480 to 0x404, local data/bss labels were added, and many previously global mnInfoBonus_* sdata2 float/double constants became local compiler-style @ labels.
what_changed: Changed configure.py so Object(NonMatching, "melee/mn/mninfobonus.c") became Object(Matching, "melee/mn/mninfobonus.c"), enabling the file to link as matched.
Added a small inline helper textSize(HSD_Text* text) that assigns text->font_size.x and y to 0.0521F.
Added static void textSetup(struct mnInfoBonus_804A09B0_t* o) to create the SIS text object with HSD_SisLib_803A5ACC, apply textSize, and call HSD_SisLib_803A6368.
Replaced the previous inline mnInfoBonus_80252F8C_inline1 text sizing helper and duplicated setup sequence in mnInfoBonus_80252F8C with the new textSetup(o) call.
Adjusted integer literal spelling in GObj_Create, GObj_SetupGXLink, and HSD_GObjProc_8038FD54 calls by removing unsigned suffixes such as 6U, 7U, 4U, 0x80U, and 0U.
Replaced raw JObj hide flag literal 0x10U with JOBJ_HIDDEN in two HSD_JObjSetFlags calls.

Updated config/GALE01/symbols.txt for the matched mninfobonus layout, including local ...data.0 and ...bss.0 labels, local string labels @332 through @335, and local sdata2 labels @146 through @151, @224 through @234, @236, and @336.
smart_moves: Factored the text setup sequence into a named static helper, which likely gave the compiler the desired call/inlining structure while making the code more readable than an anonymous numbered inline helper.
Kept the font-size assignment as a tiny inline helper, preserving a reusable expression shape for both x and y float fields.
Used the semantic macro JOBJ_HIDDEN instead of a raw 0x10U flag, improving maintainability without changing the underlying value.
Updated the linker/symbol metadata at the same time as flipping the object to Matching, avoiding stale global symbols for constants that now resolve as local compiler-generated labels.

Shrinking mnInfoBonus_803EFCE8 from size 0x480 to 0x404 in symbols.txt suggests the data boundary was corrected once the object linked, preventing adjacent strings from being incorrectly swallowed into the global object.
decomp_lessons: For menu files, matching can depend on helper-function boundaries: extracting a static setup helper can produce the desired codegen even when the operations are unchanged.
Literal suffixes matter for matching. Removing unsigned suffixes from small integer arguments changed source expression types while preserving values.
Prefer known SDK/project flag macros such as JOBJ_HIDDEN when they match the original constant; this documents intent and can still satisfy matching.

When a file becomes Matching, revisit symbols.txt scopes and sizes. Constants previously named as global file symbols may need to become local @ labels, and oversized data objects may need corrected extents.
SIS text setup patterns can be expressed as create text object, set font_size fields, then configure with HSD_SisLib_803A6368; isolating that pattern may be useful for matching similar menu code.
naming_conventions: New helper names use descriptive lowerCamelCase-style local names: textSize and textSetup.
Existing decomp placeholder function names remain address-based for unmatched/unknown mninfobonus functions, such as mnInfoBonus_802528F8 and mnInfoBonus_80252F8C.
Compiler-generated local constants in symbols.txt use @number labels for sdata2 and string objects once the file is linked.
Synthetic section-boundary labels use ellipsis names such as ...data.0 and ...bss.0.
The project macro JOBJ_HIDDEN is preferred over the raw JObj flag literal 0x10U.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Moved text object creation and configuration out of mnInfoBonus_80252F8C into a static helper textSetup, changing call structure while preserving operations.
Kept text font-size writes in a separate inline helper textSize, likely to influence inlining/code shape around HSD_Text field stores.
Changed unsigned integer constants to unsuffixed integer constants in several GObj/HSD calls to better match original codegen.
Replaced raw hide flag constants with JOBJ_HIDDEN in HSD_JObjSetFlags calls, preserving value while aligning with project headers.
Corrected symbol scopes and labels after matching so rodata/sdata2 constants are represented as local compiler labels rather than exported mnInfoBonus_* globals.
review_feedback: No review comments were present in the provided PR context.
The PR had one issue comment according to counts, but no body excerpt was provided, so no specific reviewer feedback can be extracted.
follow_up_queries: Find other menu files using HSD_SisLib_803A5ACC followed by font_size writes and HSD_SisLib_803A6368 that may benefit from the textSetup/textSize helper pattern.
Search for raw HSD_JObjSetFlags flag value 0x10U or 0x10 in menu code and check whether JOBJ_HIDDEN improves clarity or matching.
Search for GObj_Create and GObj_SetupGXLink calls with unsigned-suffixed literals in nonmatching files to test whether unsuffixed literals affect matching.
Review symbols around newly matched menu objects for oversized data ranges that may include adjacent strings or constants.
